Text[0]: The Starlight Stalls are in full swing! Will you be heading there?
Only a privileged few of the Boonewa could have done this, but who?
I have no doubt Alxaal and Prishe will be safe at your side.
Text[1]: But do make sure Bakool Ja Ja doesn't overexert himself.

Text[0]: I feel for you. While Genolt is a brilliant adaptor, it's as if he's stuck on full volume. It's all I can do to put up with the clamor.
I feel for you. While Genolt is a brilliant adapter, it's as if he's stuck on full volume. It's all I can do to put up with the clamor.
I can tell you've a good eye, and I'm not talking about your ocular capabilities. What I mean is that you seem to be well suited to finding lost valuables, useful resources and the like.

I was a living a life of excesses, bound for an early grave, when Cahciua came along. Though I was a complete stranger, she took me under her wing and set me straight.

Before the ceremony, we perused the Tuliyollal saga on Morrow's Measure. I am proud to see Yok Huy glyphic traditions so prominently displayed in the city.

Of course, the professor continues to plumb the depths of the aetherial sea, but naturally he also wishes to gain a deeper understanding of what happened in Pandæmonium.
Text[1]: This means uncovering what secrets might still lie within the Heart of Sabik. Of particular interest is ascertaining whether it can yet magnify one's ambitions.

Text[0]: The professor has been quite anxious since you left─I suspect he's worried about how Erichthonios will respond to the mammet.
Hello there. I'm afraid we aren't open for business yet. Nonetheless, we look forward to your custom in the near future!
Erichthonios's face lit up when he mentioned you. I see how close your ordeals brought you three, and I expect time will do little to fray the bond you share.

Text[1]: Despite what some might say, I'm not too concerned about it. If he's anything like his father Gulool Ja Ja, I'm sure things will work out. That Wuk Lamat seems a good sort, as well.

Text[0]: The preparations continue at the Starlight Stalls. Will you be heading there?
